items.title: Here's Why Salesforce.com (CRM) Fell More Than Broader Market
items.description: In the latest trading session, Salesforce.com (CRM) closed at $185, marking a -4.37% move from the previous day.

items.title: New AI Worries End Dow Industrials’ Three-Session Winning Streak
items.description: Financial stocks fall, as Wall Street’s ‘schizophrenic personality’ on artificial intelligence stalls momentum.

items.title: Salesforce Reshapes Workforce And Leadership As AI Push Meets Weak CRM Returns
items.description: Salesforce is cutting fewer than 1,000 roles across marketing, product, data, and Agentforce related teams as it sharpens its AI first focus. The company is also reshaping its leadership, with six new executive appointments across key areas including Agentforce and Slack. Management is aiming to align resources with its AI priorities while responding to investor pressure around profitability and margins. For investors watching NYSE:CRM, these moves come as the stock trades around $193.45,...

items.title: The AI-fueled software meltdown is overblown
items.description: Software stocks are getting hammered on fears of an AI takeover. But the narrative is overblown.

items.title: These 5 Software Stocks Could Double in Price This Year, Says Morgan Stanley
items.description: After last week's "broad and largely indiscriminate" software sell-off, some stocks within the industry are trading at a more than 50% discount to their fair value, Morgan Stanley analysts wrote in a note on Wednesday.
